channel.description: Recent content in Learn to Code Career Change on simeononsecurity

item.title: How to Start a Career in Software Development: Entry Paths and First Steps
item.category: "how to start a career in software development" , "how to become a software developer" , "software development entry paths" , "learn to code career change" , "first developer job" , "breaking into software development" , "software developer beginner guide"
item.description: Learn the four main ways to break into software development — degree, bootcamp, self-study, and military — and how to choose the right entry path for your situation.
